headline: Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Pricing Reflect Its Recent 40% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Brown & Brown's current share price still reflects good value, it helps to start by lining up the recent returns with the underlying valuation checks that will be unpacked next. The stock closed at US$67.72, with short term moves of 0.4% over 7 days and 1.0% over 30 days, set against a year to date return of a 12.8% decline and a 39.9% decline over the last year. The 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 13.1% and 40.7% respectively. These mixed returns have put fresh...

summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
